name: ASPEN AEROGELS INC
business: Aspen Aerogels, Inc. is an aerogel technology company that designs, develops and manufactures innovative, high-performance aerogel materials used primarily in the energy industrial, sustainable insulation materials, and electric vehicle (EV) markets. Our core businesses are organized into two reportable segments: Thermal Barrier and Energy Industrial.
sellsTo: energy industrial market (oil producers, refineries, petrochemical plants, LNG facilities, power generating assets)
electric vehicle (EV) market (EV manufacturers, Tier 1 automotive suppliers, lithium-ion battery manufacturers, e-mobility and energy storage companies)

exposures.sentence: We have developed and commercialized our proprietary line of PyroThin aerogel thermal barriers for use in battery packs in EVs.

We believe we will have additional opportunities to address high-value applications in the global insulation market, as well as in adjacent market opportunities such as energy storage applications, including battery energy storage systems, electrification applications, and other potential adjacent applications.

Our insulation is used by oil producers and the owners and operators of refineries, petrochemical plants, liquefied natural gas (LNG) facilities, power generating assets, and other energy industrial sites.

Our insulation is used by oil producers and the owners and operators of refineries, petrochemical plants, liquefied natural gas (LNG) facilities, power generating assets, and other energy industrial sites.
Customers in these markets have used our products for applications such as military aircrafts, trains, and buses.
Power Generation: We are targeting operators of gas, coal, nuclear, hydro, and solar power generating facilities.

catalysts.event: Replace damaged emissions control unit at East Providence facility
catalysts.sentence: We are in the process of replacing the damaged emissions control unit with a new unit, but do not expect to have the replacement online and fully functional until the second half of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Multi-billion dollar global market for energy industrial insulation materials
tamClaims.sentence: Our technologically advanced insulation products are targeted at the multi-billion dollar global market for energy industrial insulation materials.

tamClaims.claim: Multi-billion dollar global lithium-ion battery market
tamClaims.sentence: The multi-billion dollar global lithium-ion battery market continues to grow and evolve rapidly.
